name: Caesar Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. The lettuce is trimmed and torn into bite-sized pieces, rinsed, and thoroughly patted dry or spun in a salad spinner. You may need 2-3 heads of romaine large enough for a big salad.
2. Make homemade bread in 1-inch cubes and sauté in butter until golden brown, serving warm on chilled crisp greens.
3. In a large salad bowl, combine the egg yolk, lemon juice, salt, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Whisk in garlic, Worcestershire sauce, and mustard until thoroughly combined.
4. With a gentle rolling motion, incorporate the romaine lettuce. Add the vinegar and remaining olive oil in the proportions of 1 part vinegar to 2 parts oil until you achieve the desired consistency and flavor.
5. Roll the salad gently, adding black pepper to taste. The salad can be chilled at this point but not for too long.
6. Just before serving, place warm croutons in the center of the salad and Parmesan cheese in a ring around the circumference. Serve gently.
